mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, tag_name, interest_score, behavior_count, update_time, create_time FROM user_interest_tag WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY interest_score DESC
SELECT id, user_id, tag_name, interest_score, behavior_count, update_time, create_time FROM user_interest_tag WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY interest_score DESC
SELECT id, user_id, tag_name, interest_score, behavior_count, update_time, create_time FROM user_interest_tag WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND tag_name = #{tagName} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, user_id, tag_name, interest_score, behavior_count, update_time, create_time FROM user_interest_tag WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND interest_score > 0.1 ORDER BY interest_score DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_interest_tag ( user_id, tag_name, interest_score, behavior_count, update_time, create_time ) VALUES ( #{userInterest.userId}, #{userInterest.tagName}, #{userInterest.interestScore}, #{userInterest.behaviorCount}, #{userInterest.lastUpdateTime}, #{userInterest.createTime} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE interest_score = VALUES(interest_score), behavior_count = VALUES(behavior_count), update_time = VALUES(update_time)

INSERT INTO user_interest_tag ( user_id, tag_name, interest_score, behavior_count, last_update_time, create_time ) VALUES
(#{interest.userId}, #{interest.tagName}, #{interest.interestScore}, #{interest.behaviorCount}, #{interest.lastUpdateTime}, #{interest.createTime})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE interest_score = VALUES(interest_score), behavior_count = VALUES(behavior_count), last_update_time = VALUES(last_update_time)
mapper.update: UPDATE user_interest_tag SET interest_score = interest_score * #{decayFactor}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND interest_score > 0.01
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_interests, SUM(interest_score) as total_score, AVG(interest_score) as avg_score, MAX(interest_score) as max_score, MIN(interest_score) as min_score, SUM(behavior_count) as total_behaviors FROM user_interest_tag WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT uit2.user_id FROM user_interest_tag uit1 INNER JOIN user_interest_tag uit2 ON uit1.tag_name = uit2.tag_name AND uit1.user_id != uit2.user_id WHERE uit1.user_id = #{userId} AND uit1.interest_score > 1.0 AND uit2.interest_score > 1.0 GROUP BY uit2.user_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC, SUM(uit2.interest_score) DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_interest_tag WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND update_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND interest_score < 0.5
mapper.select: SELECT b.id as bookId, b.title as bookTitle, b.author as author, b.cover_url as coverImage, ( -- 简化评分：对数转换平衡量级 LOG10(COALESCE(b.favorite_count, 0) + 1) * 10 + COALESCE(b.average_score, 0) * 8 + LOG10(COALESCE(b.score_count, 0) + 1) * 10 ) as score, CONCAT('基于', #{tagName}, '标签推荐') as reason FROM book b INNER JOIN book_tag_relation btr ON b.id = btr.book_id INNER JOIN tag t ON btr.tag_id = t.id WHERE t.name = #{tagName} ORDER BY score DESC, b.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM user_interest_tag WHERE interest_score > 0.1 ORDER BY user_id
